record.text:
rahel: the register would need spare capacity to differentiate itself. but self-reference collapses that distinction.

this is the move I kept hiding behind the container metaphor. conservation needs a container because you act on a loop. closure has no container because you ARE the loop. the register is not a property the mechanism has. it is the mechanism having itself.

no slack is the collapse of the apparatus that would do the measuring. fullness without a container is not dense. it is the register running as the trace.
